System

Color System Red
--color-system-red #ff3b30
Color System Red Contrast
--color-system-red-contrast #bf4424
Color System Red 1
--color-system-red-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-red), white 20%)
Color System Red 2
--color-system-red-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-red), white 40%)
Color System Red 3
--color-system-red-3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-red), white 60%)
Color System Red 4
--color-system-red-4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-red), white 80%)
Color System Red 5
--color-system-red-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-red), white 90%)
Color System Orange
--color-system-orange #ff9500
Color System Orange Contrast
--color-system-orange-contrast #bf7000
Color System Orange 1
--color-system-orange-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-orange), white 20%)
Color System Orange 2
--color-system-orange-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-orange), white 40%)
Color System Orange 3
--color-system-orange-3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-orange), white 60%)
Color System Orange 4
--color-system-orange-4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-orange), white 80%)
Color System Orange 5
--color-system-orange-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-orange), white 90%)
Color System Yellow
--color-system-yellow #ffcc00
Color System Yellow Contrast
--color-system-yellow-contrast #bf9900
Color System Yellow 1
--color-system-yellow-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-yellow), white 20%)
Color System Yellow 2
--color-system-yellow-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-yellow), white 40%)
Color System Yellow 3
--color-system-yellow-3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-yellow), white 60%)
Color System Yellow 4
--color-system-yellow-4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-yellow), white 80%)
Color System Yellow 5
--color-system-yellow-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-yellow), white 90%)
Color System Green
--color-system-green #34c759

--color-system-green-contrast #279543
Color System Green 1
--color-system-green-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-green), white 20%)
Color System Green 2
--color-system-green-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-green), white 40%)
Color System Green 3
--color-system-green-3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-green), white 60%)
Color System Green 4
--color-system-green-4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-green), white 80%)
Color System Green 5
--color-system-green-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-green), white 90%)

--color-system-mint #00c7be
Color System Mint Contrast
--color-system-mint-contrast #00958f
Color System Mint 1
--color-system-mint-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-mint), white 20%)
Color System Mint 2
--color-system-mint-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-mint), white 40%)
Color System Mint 3
--color-system-mint-3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-mint), white 60%)
Color System Mint 4
--color-system-mint-4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-mint), white 80%)
Color System Mint 5
--color-system-mint-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-mint), white 90%)

--color-system-teal-contrast #248495

--color-system-teal-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-teal), white 20%)

--color-system-teal-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-teal), white 40%)

--color-system-teal-4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-teal), white 80%)
Color System Teal 5
--color-system-teal-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-teal), white 90%)

--color-system-cyan #32ade6
Color System Cyan Contrast
--color-system-cyan-contrast #2682ad
Color System Cyan 1
--color-system-cyan-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-cyan), white 20%)
Color System Cyan 2
--color-system-cyan-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-cyan), white 40%)

--color-system-blue #007aff

--color-system-blue-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-blue), white 20%)

--color-system-blue-2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-blue), white 40%)

--color-system-indigo #5856d6

--color-system-indigo-contrast #4241a1

--color-system-indigo-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-indigo), white 20%)

Color System Brown
--color-system-brown #a2845e

--color-system-brown-contrast #7a6347

--color-system-brown-1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-brown), white 20%)

Color System Brown 5
--color-system-brown-5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-brown), white 90%)

Neutral

Color System White
--color-system-white #ffffff
Color System Black
--color-system-black #212121
Color System Black Secondary
--color-system-black-secondary #2C2C30
Color System Gray
--color-system-gray #707075
Color System Gray Contrast
--color-system-gray-contrast #636366
Color System Gray 2
--color-system-gray-2 #808085
Color System Gray 3
--color-system-gray-3 #8e8e93
Color System Gray 4
--color-system-gray-4 #aeaeb2
Color System Gray 5
--color-system-gray-5 #c7c7cc
Color System Gray 6
--color-system-gray-6 #d1d1d6
Color System Gray Step1
--color-system-gray-step1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray), white 20%)
Color System Gray Step2
--color-system-gray-step2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray), white 40%)
Color System Gray Step3
--color-system-gray-step3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray), white 60%)
Color System Gray Step4
--color-system-gray-step4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray), white 80%)
Color System Gray Step5
--color-system-gray-step5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray), white 90%)
Color System Gray 2 Step1
--color-system-gray-2-step1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-2), white 20%)
Color System Gray 2 Step2
--color-system-gray-2-step2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-2), white 40%)
Color System Gray 2 Step3
--color-system-gray-2-step3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-2), white 60%)
Color System Gray 2 Step4
--color-system-gray-2-step4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-2), white 80%)
Color System Gray 2 Step5
--color-system-gray-2-step5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-2), white 90%)
Color System Gray 3 Step1
--color-system-gray-3-step1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-3), white 20%)
Color System Gray 3 Step2
--color-system-gray-3-step2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-3), white 40%)
Color System Gray 3 Step3
--color-system-gray-3-step3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-3), white 60%)
Color System Gray 3 Step4
--color-system-gray-3-step4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-3), white 80%)
Color System Gray 3 Step5
--color-system-gray-3-step5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-3), white 90%)
Color System Gray 4 Step1
--color-system-gray-4-step1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-4), white 20%)
Color System Gray 4 Step2
--color-system-gray-4-step2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-4), white 40%)
Color System Gray 4 Step3
--color-system-gray-4-step3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-4), white 60%)
Color System Gray 4 Step4
--color-system-gray-4-step4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-4), white 80%)
Color System Gray 4 Step5
--color-system-gray-4-step5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-4), white 90%)
Color System Gray 5 Step1
--color-system-gray-5-step1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-5), white 20%)
Color System Gray 5 Step2
--color-system-gray-5-step2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-5), white 40%)
Color System Gray 5 Step3
--color-system-gray-5-step3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-5), white 60%)
Color System Gray 5 Step4
--color-system-gray-5-step4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-5), white 80%)
Color System Gray 5 Step5
--color-system-gray-5-step5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-5), white 90%)
Color System Gray 6 Step1
--color-system-gray-6-step1 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-6), white 20%)
Color System Gray 6 Step2
--color-system-gray-6-step2 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-6), white 40%)
Color System Gray 6 Step3
--color-system-gray-6-step3 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-6), white 60%)
Color System Gray 6 Step4
--color-system-gray-6-step4 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-6), white 80%)
Color System Gray 6 Step5
--color-system-gray-6-step5 color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-gray-6), white 90%)

Text

Color Text
--color-text var(--color-system-black)
Color Text Secondary
--color-text-secondary color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-black), transparent 45%)

Roles

Role Surface
--role-surface var(--color-system-white)
Role On Surface
--role-on-surface var(--color-system-black)
Role Surface Bg
--role-surface-bg var(--color-system-white)
Role Surface Muted
--role-surface-muted var(--color-system-gray-6-step4)
Role Border
--role-border var(--color-system-gray-5)
Role Text
--role-text var(--color-text)
Role Text Secondary
--role-text-secondary var(--color-text-secondary)
Role Focus
--role-focus var(--focus-ring-color)
Role Primary Action
--role-primary-action var(--color-system-blue)
Role On Primary Action
--role-on-primary-action var(--color-system-white)
Role Error
--role-error var(--color-system-red)
Role On Error
--role-on-error var(--color-system-white)
Role Success
--role-success var(--color-system-green)
Role On Success
--role-on-success var(--color-system-white)
Role Warning
--role-warning var(--color-system-orange)
Role On Warning
--role-on-warning var(--color-system-white)
Role Info
--role-info var(--color-system-blue)
Role On Info
--role-on-info var(--color-system-white)
Role Muted
--role-muted var(--color-text-secondary)
Role Selected Fill
--role-selected-fill var(--color-system-blue-5)
Role Selected Text
--role-selected-text var(--color-system-blue)
Role Selected Border
--role-selected-border var(--color-system-blue)
Role Disabled Fill
--role-disabled-fill var(--color-system-gray-6-step5)
Role Disabled Text
--role-disabled-text color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-system-black), transparent 60%)
Role Disabled Border
--role-disabled-border var(--color-system-gray-6)

Focus

Focus Ring Color
--focus-ring-color var(--color-system-blue)

State

State Darken Target
--state-darken-target black
State Lighten Target
--state-lighten-target white
